option.name: pattern
option.value: sqlite3 db/data.db "SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = 'config'"

option.name: pattern
option.value: dir db

option.name: pattern
option.value: sqlite3 db/db.sqlite "SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = 'config'"

option.name: pattern
option.value: where sqlite3

option.name: pattern
option.value: npx sqlite3 db/db.sqlite "SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = 'config'"

option.name: pattern
option.value: npm list sqlite3

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3'); const db = new sqlite3.Database('db/db.sqlite'); db.get('SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = ?', ['config'], (err, row) => { if (err) throw err; console.log(row.value); db.close(); });"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3'); const db = new sqlite3.Database('db/db.sqlite'); db.get('SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = ?', ['config'], (err, row) => { if (err) { console.error(err.message); process.exit(1); } console.log(row.value); db.close(); });"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3'); console.log('SQLite3 module loaded'); const db = new sqlite3.Database('db/db.sqlite', (err) => { if (err) { console.error('Database error:', err.message); process.exit(1); } else { console.log('Connected to database'); } }); db.get('SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = ?', ['config'], (err, row) => { if (err) { console.error('Query error:', err.message); process.exit(1); } console.log('Config value:', row.value); db.close(); });"

option.name: pattern
option.value: npm install sqlite3

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3'); console.log('SQLite3 module loaded:', sqlite3); const db = new sqlite3.Database('db/db.sqlite', (err) => { if (err) { console.error('Database error:', err.message); process.exit(1); } else { console.log('Connected to database'); } }); db.get('SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = ?', ['config'], (err, row) => { if (err) { console.error('Query error:', err.message); process.exit(1); } console.log('Config value:', row.value); db.close(); });"

option.name: pattern
option.value: npm list --depth=0

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "const sqlite = require('sqlite'); const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3'); console.log('SQLite module loaded:', sqlite); console.log('SQLite3 module loaded:', sqlite3); const db = await sqlite.open({ filename: 'db/db.sqlite', driver: sqlite3.Database }); const row = await db.get('SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = ?', 'config'); console.log('Config value:', row.value); await db.close();"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "const sqlite = require('sqlite'); const sqlite3 = require('sqlite3'); console.log('SQLite module loaded:', sqlite); console.log('SQLite3 module loaded:', sqlite3); (async () => { try { const db = await sqlite.open({ filename: 'db/db.sqlite', driver: sqlite3.Database }); const row = await db.get('SELECT value FROM key_value WHERE key = ?', 'config'); console.log('Config value:', row.value); await db.close(); } catch (err) { console.error('Error:', err.message); } })();"

option.name: pattern
option.value: npm install sqlite

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "console.log('Current directory:', process.cwd()); console.log('Files in db directory:', require('fs').readdirSync('db'));"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "console.log('Current directory:', process.cwd()); console.log('Files in db directory:', require('fs').readdirSync('db')); process.exit(0);"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -p "process.cwd()"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -p "require('fs').readdirSync('db')"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "console.log(require('fs').readdirSync('db'))"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "console.log('Files in db directory:', require('fs').readdirSync('db').join(', '));"

option.name: pattern
option.value: node -e "console.log('Files in db directory: ' + require('fs').readdirSync('db').join(', '));"
